features.label: Features
features.descripcion: Homely centralizes time tracking, payments, contracts and benefits. Eliminate paperwork, WhatsApp groups and verbal agreements.

items.contrato_desc: Create and send labor contracts adapted to your country's legislation. Digital signature included.
items.asistencia_desc: Approve check-ins, check-outs and absences. Full history in real time.
items.pagos_desc: Record payments, upload receipts and download PDFs for each transaction.
items.dashboard_desc: Monthly and annual statistics. Visualize the economic performance of the contract.
items.alertas_desc: Receive notifications for payment dates, expirations and accumulated benefits.
items.reportes_desc: Generate PDF reports for any period. Legal backup in case of any dispute.

items.perfil_desc: Your verified history follows you to any country. The LinkedIn of domestic employment.
items.registro_desc: Confirm your check-in and check-out. View accepted, pending and rejected records.
items.referencias_desc: Receive digital references from previous employers, confirmed on the platform.
items.calendario_desc: View payment dates, rest days and contract expiration in one place.
items.beneficios_desc: Check your vacation balance, bonuses and other benefits in real time.
items.multiidioma_desc: Switch the language between Spanish, English and French at any time.
